meshtasticPlugin.name: gemini
meshtasticPlugin.description: Gemini AI plugin for meshtastic-node-client. Listens for messages starting with TRIGGER_TEXT (default "G, "), sends the remainder to the Google Gemini API, and broadcasts the reply to the channel. Required env: GEMINI_API_KEY. Optional env: GEMINI_TRIGGER_TEXT, GEMINI_MODEL, GEMINI_MAX_LENGTH, GEMINI_CHUNK_SIZE, GEMINI_USE_WS.
